# Permanent Marx Tattoo Studio — Salem, OR
> Permanent Marx Tattoo Studio is a licensed tattoo & piercing studio in Salem, Oregon offering custom tattoos, cover-ups, piercing, and bilingual (English/Spanish) service. 1373 Edgewater St NW. Call (503) 990-7163. Book a free consult.

## Services
- Custom tattoos
- Cover-ups
- Fine-line & blackwork
- Flash & walk-ins
- Piercing
- Jewelry

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97304)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 990-7163 · Hours: Mon–Fri 12–10pm · Sat–Sun by appointment · Languages: English, Español
